case_title: JIAN WU YU VS. BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORINA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, JIAN WU AS TO DEFENDANT BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORINA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, JIAN WU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALANCED BUILDINGS, INC., A CALIFORINA CORPORATION $8,815.31 PRINCIPAL, $178.87 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,199.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
